cases.prompt: Broadcast an order status change to that order's owner over a private channel
cases.expect: implements ShouldBroadcast, returns a PrivateChannel orders.{userId}, authorizes in channels.php

cases.prompt: Build a presence-based chat room with Echo on the frontend
cases.expect: uses PresenceChannel, Echo.join with here/joining/leaving, authorizes chat.{roomId} membership

cases.prompt: My Echo client isn't receiving the broadcast event
cases.expect: checks implements ShouldBroadcast and the .event.name dot prefix from broadcastAs
